task: Confirm pointer metadata and preserve-policy exposure on the split-form holdout fixture while the inspect backbone grows.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"record_count\"] == 6; form=data[\"records\"][2]; assert form[\"pointer_record_index\"] == 5; assert form[\"size_policy\"] == \"preserve\"; assert data[\"records\"][5][\"kind\"] == \"binary\""'
notes: Holdout guard for the future `container.inspect.json` backbone on the complex pointer fixture.

task: Confirm descriptor links and continuation-chain metadata stay stable on the split-form holdout fixture.
verification: bash -lc 'uv run formbin inspect tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"descriptor_links\"] == [{\"label\": \"form\", \"descriptor_index\": 1, \"payload_index\": 2}, {\"label\": \"module\", \"descriptor_index\": 3, \"payload_index\": 4}]; assert data[\"continuation_chains\"] == [{\"kind\": \"form\", \"label\": \"form\", \"head_record_index\": 2, \"record_indices\": [2, 5]}]; assert data[\"records\"][5][\"record_role\"] == \"form_continuation\"; assert data[\"records\"][5][\"continuation_chain\"] == [2, 5]"'
notes: Protected confirmation that richer inspect backbone metadata survives the current split-form holdout fixture.

task: Confirm inspect tooling can read the exported container.inspect.json backbone from the split-form holdout unpack dir.
verification: bash -lc 'tmpdir="$(mktemp -d)"; uv run formbin unpack tests/fixtures/i584-load-form.Form.bin -o "$tmpdir/unpack" >/dev/null && uv run formbin inspect "$tmpdir/unpack" --json | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); assert data[\"pointer_links\"] == [{\"source_record_index\": 2, \"target_record_index\": 5, \"target_header_start\": 89120, \"source_label\": \"form\", \"target_label\": \"opaque\"}]; layout=data[\"record_layout\"]; assert layout[\"prefix_size\"] == 16; assert layout[\"total_size\"] == 129805; assert layout[\"record_spans\"][2][\"header_end\"] == 653; assert layout[\"record_spans\"][-1][\"body_end\"] == 129805"'
notes: Protected confirmation that the existing inspect command can consume the unpacked container.inspect.json backbone on the split-form holdout fixture.
